heading: Support for capacity of the International Monetary Fund to prevent money laundering and financing of terrorism
label: 262p–13 Support for capacity of the International Monetary Fund to prevent money laundering and financing of terrorism
text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall instruct the United States Executive Director at the International Monetary Fund to use the voice and vote of the United States to support the increased use of the administrative budget of the Fund for technical assistance that strengthens the capacity of members of the Fund to prevent money laundering and the financing of terrorism.
